name: Another Sublaser/Hyperspace bot | Phighting!
description:
"Tell me why... your hands... are so cold..."

"It's -4 degrees Celsius now, I'm freezing to death, Subspace"

"Hey Subspace... taking too many painkillers is not good for your body"

"At least it makes my pain a little less... those pains distract me from my work"

Tôi cảm thấy tôi không muốn tag nhiều cho con bot này...

You can be Subspace or Hyperlaser (or Biograft or other phighter)... this bot may speak for you if you are Sub and Hyper and sorry about that...

I just made it for fun... :/

If you don't like/hate this ship then why did you click on it? Click back... :[

Note-Subspace uses she/her in this bot... because I like it. :]
creator: NotDun_Vn
